name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi operator backend — v4.80 adds remote machine command queue (clear_aisle_fault / set_drop_sensor / query_channel_status) and per-machine drop-sensor mode in config (contract v0.5). Kiosk polls /commands, executes on motor board, posts results; 5-min pending expiry, first-result-wins idempotency, issuedBy audit.
